segments.text: To You, O Lord, I lift up my soul.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O my God, I trust in You; Let me not be ashamed; Let not my enemies triumph over me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Indeed, let no one who waits on You be ashamed; Let those be ashamed who deal treacherously without cause.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Show me Your ways, O Lord; Teach me Your paths.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Lead me in Your truth and teach me, For You are the God of my salvation; On You I wait all the day.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Remember, O Lord, Your tender mercies and Your lovingkindnesses, For they are from of old.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Do not remember the sins of my youth, nor my transgressions; According to Your mercy remember me, For Your goodness' sake, O Lord.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Good and upright is the Lord;
Therefore He teaches sinners in the way.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The humble He guides in justice, And the humble He teaches His way.
All the paths of the Lord are mercy and truth, To such as keep His covenant and His testimonies.
For Your name's sake, O Lord, Pardon my iniquity, for it is great.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Who is the man that fears the Lord?
Him shall He teach in the way He chooses.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: He himself shall dwell in prosperity, And his descendants shall inherit the earth.
The secret of the Lord is with those who fear Him,
And He will show them His covenant.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: My eyes are ever toward the Lord, For He shall pluck my feet out of the net.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Turn Yourself to me, and have mercy on me, For I am desolate and afflicted.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The troubles of my heart have enlarged; Bring me out of my distresses!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Look on my affliction and my pain, And forgive all my sins.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Consider my enemies, for they are many; And they hate me with cruel hatred.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Keep my soul, and deliver me; Let me not be ashamed, for I put my trust in You.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let integrity and uprightness preserve me, For I wait for You.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Redeem Israel, O God, Out of all their troubles!
segments.speaker: David
